lingering_potion.title: Brew a Lingering Potion of Regeneration (requires Dragon Breath — the first unique potion in the game)

complete_feast.title: Eat one meal from every End-dimension food source in a single session (dragon, enderman, shulker, chorus)

subtitle.text: One of every source. That is the Dungeon Meshi completion condition.

description: Lingering Potions require Dragon Breath to brew.
They are throwable potions that leave a cloud effect on the ground.
For regeneration: an area of healing that affects you and allies.
They are useful in the extended boss fights of Ch15-17.
1. Ender Dragon Meat / Dragon Steak (End's Delight)
Eating all four is the Dungeon Meshi proof-of-completion for the End.
You have not merely visited this dimension.
You have lived in it — hunted in it, cooked in it, eaten in it.
Not a dungeon. Not a boss arena. Territory.
→ Brew a Lingering Potion using Dragon Breath [check]
→ Eat one meal from every End food source in a session [check]
